title: The Material Shadow of the Digital Economy: Tracing the Supply-Chain Footprint of ICT across 164 Economies, 1990–2029

creators.name: Gómez, Raimundo Elías
creators.affiliation: National Scientific and Technical Research Council (CONICET), Argentina; Institute of Sociology, University of Porto, Portugal

description: Consumption-based material footprint of five ICT sectors computed via Leontief inverse (Schur complement + Neumann series) applied to the GLORIA MRIO database (164 economies, 120 sectors, 367 material indicators, 8 benchmark years 1990–2029). Includes baseline and sensitivity analysis (excluding sector 91), pre-computed footprint and multiplier data, and all figures.
